summary: P1 Optimizations fully tested. All 22 P1 tests passed + all 39 P0 regression tests passed (61 total). Pre-Warm Startup, Staggered Cache Refresh, SharedTrades Incremental, and Parallel Treasury Fallback all working correctly.

minor.issue: Circuit breaker OPEN (3 failures) - jblanked.com API returning 401 Unauthorized. Using static fallback correctly.
RVX using FALLBACK (Yahoo Finance ^RVX delisted). Static fallback value 24.0 used correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ Pre-Warm: warm_caches() loads all 10 data sources (5/7 macro sources have real data)
✅ Pre-Warm: no np.random in macro fallback paths (verified via grep)
✅ Staggered Refresh: macro_refresh_loop background task started (60s interval)
✅ Staggered Refresh: 80% TTL threshold = 1440s (correct)
✅ Staggered Refresh: 6/7 circuit breakers CLOSED after warm-up
✅ SharedTrades: ring buffer attributes present (_buffer, _buffer_end, _cache_time, CACHE_DURATION=120s)
✅ SharedTrades: cold start fetches full 60min lookback window
✅ SharedTrades: incremental fetch uses buffer_end as fetch_start
✅ SharedTrades: ring buffer prunes trades older than lookback window
✅ SharedTrades: stale buffer fallback (LKG pattern) on error
✅ Parallel Treasury: _fetch_yield_ticker uses ThreadPoolExecutor + as_completed
✅ Parallel Treasury: dispatches both tickers (^UST2Y, 2YY=F) in parallel
✅ Parallel Treasury: cancels remaining futures after first success
✅ Parallel Treasury: 2Y yield uses ^UST2Y with 2YY=F fallback
✅ Parallel Treasury: API returns valid data (us2y_source=2YY=F won the race)
✅ V3 Signal: dqs=1.0, dqs_action=FULL after warm-up
✅ V3 Signal nivel_1: includes dqs and dqs_action for frontend
✅ P0 Regression: LKGStore LIVE/STALE/FALLBACK functional
✅ P0 Regression: CircuitBreaker state transitions functional
✅ P0 Regression: DataEpochManager seal_epoch() functional
✅ P0 Regression: DQS step function lot scaling functional
✅ P0 Regression: /api/v3/data-quality API functional
✅ P0 Data Quality: All 39 tests passed (LKG, CircuitBreaker, DataEpoch, DQS)
critical_code_review_comments: warm_caches() correctly pre-loads all 10 data sources on startup (VIX, VXN, RVX, term_structure, treasury, gamma MNQ/MES, calendar, trades MNQ/MES)
macro_refresh_loop() correctly runs every 60s and refreshes caches at 80% TTL (1440s for macro, 69120s for gamma)
SharedTradesService correctly implements ring buffer with delta fetch (incremental) and stale buffer fallback (LKG pattern)
_fetch_yield_ticker correctly uses ThreadPoolExecutor race pattern for ^UST2Y and 2YY=F in parallel
Backend logs confirm: 'Cache warm-up complete: 10/10 sources loaded' and 'Macro Refresh Loop: Starting (60s interval, 80% TTL threshold)'
No np.random in macro fallback paths - old _simulate_* methods removed, using static STATIC_FALLBACKS
P0 Data Quality Layer (LKG, CircuitBreaker, DataEpoch, DQS) unchanged and fully functional
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live data and synthetic unit test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Optimizations fully tested. Key components: (1) warm_caches() in startup_live_data pre-loads all 10 sources, (2) macro_refresh_loop() background task refreshes at 80% TTL, (3) SharedTradesService uses ring buffer with delta fetch + stale buffer fallback, (4) _fetch_yield_ticker uses ThreadPoolExecutor race pattern. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_p1_optimizations.py. P0 Data Quality Layer tests: /app/backend/tests/test_data_quality.py. Current live status: VIX/VXN/term_structure/treasury/gamma are LIVE, RVX and economic_calendar are FALLBACK (known issues). DQS=1.0 after warm-up.
